---
title: "File Comparison Report"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
    self_contained: true
params:
  # Comparison data frame containing file paths, results and comments
  dt:       NULL
  # Optional string pattern used to omit rows from comparisons
  omit_val: NULL
  # Used verifyr2 library version
  version:  NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

dt       <- params$dt
omit_val <- params$omit_val
version  <- params$version
n_total  <- nrow(dt)
n_pass   <- sum(grepl("No differences", dt$comparison))
n_fail   <- n_total - n_pass
gh_link  <- "https://github.com/ejuhjav/verifyr2"

# Pre-render all FAIL diffs
diff_results <- vector("list", n_total)

# Initialise config once outside the loop
opts <- verifyr2::Config$new()
opts$set("details.mode", "summary")

for (i in seq_len(n_total)) {
  if (grepl("No differences", dt$comparison[i])) next

  comparator <- verifyr2::create_comparator(dt$file1[i], dt$file2[i])

  details <- tryCatch(
    comparator$vrf_details(config = opts, omit = omit_val),
    error = function(e) {
      list(list(
        type    = "text",
        content = paste0(
          "<p style='color:red;'>Error: ", conditionMessage(e), "</p>"
        )
      ))
    }
  )

  # Collect all detail items — a file can return multiple items
  item_html <- character(0)
  for (d in details) {
    item_html <- c(item_html, as.character(d$content))
  }
  diff_results[[i]] <- paste(item_html, collapse = "")
}
```

```{r load_styles, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
css_file <- "report_styles.css"
image_diff_css_file <- "image_diff_styles.css"
if (file.exists(css_file) && file.exists(image_diff_css_file)) {
  cat(
    "<style>\n",
    paste(readLines(css_file, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n"),
    paste(readLines(image_diff_css_file, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n"),
    "\n</style>\n"
  )
}

```

```{r header, results='asis'}
logo_path <- "verifyr2.ico"
logo_html <- ""
if (file.exists(logo_path)) {
  logo_b64  <- base64enc::base64encode(logo_path)
  logo_html <- paste0(
    "<a href='", gh_link, "' title='verifyr2 in github' target='_blank'>",
    "<img src='data:image/x-icon;base64,",
    base64enc::base64encode(logo_path),
    "'/>",
    "</a>"
  )
}
omit_html <- if (!is.null(omit_val)) {
  paste0(
    " &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Omit pattern:</strong> <code>",
    omit_val,
    "</code>"
  )
} else {
  ""
}
cat(paste0(
  "<div class='report-header'>",
  logo_html,
  "<strong>Generated:</strong> ",
  format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
  omit_html,
  " &nbsp;|&nbsp; <strong>Generated with</strong> ",
  "<a href='", gh_link, "' title='verifyr2 in github' target='_blank'>",
  "verifyr2 (v", version, ")",
  "</a>",
  "</div>"
))
```

## Overview

```{r overview}
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    "Total files" = n_total,
    Match = paste0(
      "<span style='color:#5a8a20;font-weight:700;'>", n_pass, "</span>"
    ),
    Mismatch = paste0(
      "<span style='color:#c04820;font-weight:700;'>", n_fail, "</span>"
    ),
    check.names = FALSE
  ),
  format = "html",
  align  = c("c", "c", "c"),
  escape = FALSE
)
```

## Summary

```{r summary_table}
is_match    <- grepl("No differences", dt$comparison)
badge_match <- paste0(
  "<span class='badge-match' style='padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;",
  "font-size:11px;font-weight:700;background:#e8f5d0;color:#5a8a20;'>",
  "Match</span>"
)
badge_mismatch <- paste0(
  "<span class='badge-mismatch' style='padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;",
  "font-size:11px;font-weight:700;background:#fde9e0;color:#c04820;'>",
  "Mismatch</span>"
)
status_html <- ifelse(is_match, badge_match, badge_mismatch)
file_links <- paste0(
  "<a href='#detail-", seq_len(nrow(dt)), "'>",
  basename(dt$file1),
  "</a>"
)
knitr::kable(
  data.frame(
    File     = file_links,
    Result   = dt$comparison,
    Status   = status_html,
    Comments = ifelse(
      !is.null(dt$comments_details) & dt$comments_details != "",
      dt$comments_details,
      "\u2014"
    ),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  ),
  format = "html",
  align  = c("l", "l", "c", "l"),
  escape = FALSE
)
```

## Details

```{r details, results='asis'}
for (i in seq_len(nrow(dt))) {
  file1   <- dt$file1[i]
  file2   <- dt$file2[i]
  result  <- dt$comparison[i]
  comment <- dt$comments_details[i]
  is_pass <- grepl("No differences", result)
  status  <- if (is_pass) "Match" else "Mismatch"
  section_class <- if (is_pass) "file-match" else "file-mismatch"
  badge_class   <- if (is_pass) "badge-match" else "badge-mismatch"

  comment_html <- if (!is.null(comment) && comment != "") {
    paste0(
      "<div class='comment-box'><strong>Comment:</strong> ", comment, "</div>"
    )
  } else {
    ""
  }

  cat(paste0(
    "\n<div id='detail-", i, "' class='file-section ", section_class, "'>",
    "<div class='file-header'>",
    "<span class='file-name'>",
    "<strong>", basename(file1), "</strong>",
    " [<a href='#header'>back to top</a>]",
    "</span>",
    "<span class='status-badge ", badge_class, "'>", status, "</span>",
    "</div>",
    "<div class='file-paths'>",
    "<span class='path-label'>Base</span><br/>", file1, "<br/>",
    "<span class='path-label'>Compare</span><br/>", file2,
    "</div>",
    "<div class='file-result'>",
    "<span>", result, "</span>",
    comment_html,
    "</div>"
  ))

  if (is_pass) {
    cat(paste0(
      "<div class='diff-output match-message'>",
      "&#10003;&nbsp; Files are identical.",
      "</div>"
    ))
  } else {
    diff_html <- diff_results[[i]]
    cat("<div class='diff-output'>")
    if (!is.null(diff_html) && nchar(diff_html) > 0) {
      cat(diff_html)
    } else {
      cat(paste0("<p class='no-diff'>", result, "</p>"))
    }
    cat("</div>")
  }

  cat("</div>\n")
}
```
